testName: Cancel pending invite restores license seat
errorPattern: Invite row for phil+.*@adept.at not found in ag-Grid after 15s

fix.summary: ag-Grid rows can't be CSS-selected by raw email — '+' breaks the selector. Use execute() to scan [role="row"] text for the email, read row-id, then find the kebab menu across pinned and body containers sharing that row-id.
fix.pattern: Follow cancelPendingInvite(): await mBrowser.waitUntil(async () => mBrowser.execute((email) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="row"]')).find(r => r.textContent?.toLowerCase().includes(email))?.getAttribute('row-id'), emailLower), { ... }). Then find kebab via document.querySelectorAll(`[row-id="${rid}"]`) and inside each container `[aria-label="More actions for user"]`.

investigationFindings: multi.invite.form.page.cancelPendingInvite explicitly documents that row-id is a UUID and emails contain '+'. The JS row walk is the stable pattern already used for cancel flows; copying it for new invite-grid actions avoids the same trap.
rootCauseChain: SELECTOR_MISMATCH -> CSS selector with '+' in email is invalid -> row not found -> 15s timeout
